name: Crafting a Production Coordinator Resume with Multiple Creative Samples

chat_messages.text: craft a resume for this job discription with the attatched resume pdf's:

attachments.extracted_content:
Thank you for considering the Production Coordinator role with Moonbug Entertainment, an award-winning global entertainment company inspiring kids everywhere to laugh, learn and grow. The company is behind some of the biggest kids' entertainment brands in the world including CoComelon and Blippi. Moonbug believes every child should have access to our entertaining and enriching content, which is why our shows are available on more than 150 video platforms globally including Netflix, Disney+, BBC iPlayer and YouTube Kids. Moonbug is also a global leader in pre-school music and audio experiences, available on 100+ audio platforms globally. Moonbug brands extend far beyond the screen to include streaming music, toys, games, books, live events, and even theme park exhibits.

Moonbug is part of Candle Media, an independent, creator-friendly home for cutting-edge, high-quality, category-defining brands and franchises.

The Role

We are looking for a motivated and organized Production Coordinator with an interest in children's animation. You will be working as part of a busy, close-knit production team, coordinating all types of animation, and ad-based content. Working closely with the Creative Executives, Producers, Animation Directors, Production, and Animation Studios, as Production Coordinator, you'll ensure that projects are on schedule and meeting production deadlines. You'll be a key team member, overseeing the day-to-day organization of productions and communicating between all parties to ensure everything runs smoothly. You will carefully manage & liaise between internal and overseas teams while upholding communication and best practices.

This role will report on site in our Los Angeles office. 

Responsibilities

Support animation producer in the LA Office. 
Be the POC for internal departments for delivery materials and follow up on deadlines with stakeholders. 
File/asset organization. 
Daily project status tracking. 
Provide support to the LA creative team, client success team, and channel managers as needed. 
Update spreadsheets and be able to communicate internally to key stakeholders, including with Google Slide presentations
Tracking and inputting relevant production metadata upon delivery. 
Work closely with the UK post team to ensure the production pipeline is running smoothly. 
Support and manage the post-production process and delivery of episodes to broadcasters and SVODs from locked animation (SFX, Mixing, Score, Grade, and Mastering). 


Requirements

 Minimum 1-2 years experience in a production or post-production company with a focus on animation and CGI. (children's animation is a plus)
Ability to work with different time zones in particular Australia, India, Europe, and the United States. 
Good understanding of the 3D (CGI) animation pipeline and knowledge of other animation pipelines (2D, stop frame, etc). 
Familiarity with MS Office, Google Suite, Frame.io (desirable), ShotGrid, Aspera Faspex, AirTable, and Monday.com as well as any other similar software that is necessary for the role. 
The ideal candidate will be personable and organized, a self-starter with the ability to remain calm in busy situations, and an interest in all aspects of productionAbility to take, vet and distribute accurate notes in a timely manner. 
Must be able to demonstrate diligent follow through to ensure information is received and meeting notes are accurate
Self-starter with the ability to learn independently
Ability to plan and oversee calendaring for the team. 
Must be able to organize files accordingly and exercise discretion with file sharing and permission-sharing. 
Must have clear verbal and written communication skills
Must have proficient use of all production management software and tools, including but not limited to Shotgrid, fTrack, Monday.com, Aspera Faspex, and Google Suite. 
Ability to prioritize, update trackers/schedules accurately and communicate changes in a timely manner. 
Working knowledge of the pre-production and CG production pipeline
Accurately read and understand production schedules, recognizing systemic delays and flagging them to appropriate senior leader(s). 
Demonstrated ability to proactively work with A/PM and Associate/Producer to solve mid to high level production delays and issues. 
Proactively identifies more complex issues and partners with leadership to resolve. 
Collaborates well with the team and other departments and is the main point of contact. 
Responsible for correctly delivering all materials to partner studios and other teams inside of Moonbug
Responsible for receiving and vetting all materials from partner studios and other teams inside of Moonbug
Able to plan team events and carry out special projects as required

Full Sail UniversityFull Sail University
Bachelor’s Degree, Game DesignBachelor’s Degree, Game Design
2016 - Jan 20192016 - Jan 2019
Skills: Design Thinking · Mac · Art
Mad Scientists and Dinosaurs with Laser BeamsMad Scientists and Dinosaurs with Laser
Beams
Jun 2017 - PresentJun 2017 - Present
Associated with Full Sail UniversityAssociated with Full Sail University
Show project
Mad Scientists and Dinosaurs with Laser-beams is a Jurassic themed strategy board game.
Players assume the role of one of four mad scientists stuck in the Jurassic period armed only
with their Universal Linguistic Trans-Modulator (ULT-M) allowing communication with dinosaurs
and their knowledge on how to build a time machine (as well as laser-beams).
Players control various Dinosaurs from within their scientists “Dino-Cult” in-order to collect
materials from the Jurassic world or from other scientists. Players must use the materials to be
the first scientist to complete their time machine.
My Role
- Successfully brought the design of board game for a solo project to completion under a tight
deadline
- Design, Prototyping, layout, and extensive documentation
- Organized play tests, and used feedback to further the design throughout the development of
board game
Steve Savage Jr. Vs AliensSteve Savage Jr. Vs Aliens
Jan 2019 - Jun 2019Jan 2019 - Jun 2019
Associated with Full Sail UniversityAssociated with Full Sail University
Show project
Set in a not so distant future, Steve Savage Jr. will kick ass on an earth controlled by a powerful
alien race, and overrun by feral monsters.
My Role
- Balanced systems of game-play according to weekly feedback and iterative play-testing
- Closely communicated with team to assist with troubleshooting and bug fixes
-Exercised Critical thinking skills in the Design and C# scripting, implementing: 3 main
game-play systems, 4 player abilities, and numerous UI features
- Carried out the design of 3 level layouts with iterative design practices

- Collaborated with Composer Ben Johnsick in the creation of original soundtrack

chat_messages.text:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am thrilled to submit my application for the Production Coordinator role at Moonbug Entertainment. As an experienced video producer who is passionate about creating entertaining content for children, this role is perfectly aligned with my skills and interests. 

From a young age, I have always loved telling stories. I fondly remember spending countless hours building worlds, characters, and narratives with my sister through imaginative play. As I grew older, my passion for storytelling evolved into a drive to create films and videos that positively impact audiences. I was constantly filming shorts with friends and editing them using basic software on my family computer. 

Now as an aunt to a 10-year-old nephew and 11-year-old niece, I am further devoted to creating content that educates and inspires young viewers. They serve as my inspiration and drive behind pursuing opportunities at companies like Moonbug that enrich the lives of children worldwide. I want my work to spark laughter, learning, and growth for their generation. 

With over 5 years of hands-on experience directing, filming, and editing all types of videos, I have the proven ability to juggle the organizational and creative demands of production. At Wayward Music, I successfully managed the intensive planning and coordination required to produce high-quality music videos on tight budgets and deadlines. This has equipped me with the project management skills and work ethic needed to thrive as your Production Coordinator. 

Most importantly, I care deeply about fostering an entertaining and educational haven for children through media. Moonbug’s values align seamlessly with my own – from the belief that all kids deserve access to enriching content to the commitment to sparking joy and growth across generations. I would be honored to coordinate the production efforts bringing Moonbug’s beautiful stories to screens worldwide. 

Thank you for your time and consideration. I welcome the opportunity to speak further about how my skills and passion can benefit the Production Coordinator role.

Sincerely,
[Your name]

With the attached resume write a passion driven and inspiring cover letter for this job role that outlines my love for storytelling, talk about my passion for storytelling and filmmaking and how much I enjoy working with teams and talented creatives seeing projects come together:Headquartered in West Los Angeles, MOCEAN is an independent advertising agency that specializes in connecting fans to the brands they love. Three-time “Entertainment Agency of the Year” award-winner MOCEAN is a unique collaboration of creative, production and strategy experts working together under one roof. Our teams of copywriters, designers, film directors, editors, animators, social strategists, and more have re-defined the modern agency.

Partnering directly with media giants such as Disney, Netflix, Amazon, Apple, and Warner Media as well as brands like Lucid Motors and Riot Games -- MOCEAN is recognized for creating the kind of strikingly original campaigns that energize audiences and turning them into consumers.

The Freelance Creative Coordinator works with Creative Director to facilitate daily scheduling, communication, and overall workflow for the team. Acts as the internal communicator between departments and interacts with external clients for postings and asset management. This is not an entry-level position – at least one year previous related experience is required.

chat_messages.text:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I was delighted to come across the opening for a Freelance Creative Coordinator at MOCEAN. With a driving passion for visual storytelling and a talent for facilitating seamless collaboration, this role truly resonates with my creative strengths and interests. 

Since childhood, I’ve felt most alive and energized when involved with imaginative, collaborative projects. I have vivid memories of spending countless afternoons building intricate forts and fantasy worlds with friends. We would spend hours crafting intricate storylines to bring our construction projects to life. 

As I grew older, this inventive spirit never faded - it simply translated from playtime to film sets. I felt sheer joy anytime I stepped onto a production, witnessing the creative process unfold firsthand as a story transformed from script to screens. The dynamic, fast-paced nature of video production fueled me. I relished the challenge of coordinating all the moving parts, from organizing locations down to keeping talent happy throughout marathon shoots. Most of all, I loved seeing teams merge their individual talents to make visual magic.

When I discovered agencies like MOCEAN, I knew I had found my people. The imaginative essence that initially drew me to filmmaking was mirrored in the striking, culture-shaping campaigns MOCEAN is celebrated for. And the agency's emphasis on uniting cross-disciplinary teams of creative experts deeply aligns with my collaborative spirit. 

With 5+ years of hands-on production expertise under my belt, I am well prepared to facilitate fluid team workflows as your Freelance Creative Coordinator. My skills have been sharpened through intense coordination demands - from planning intensive music video shoots on tight budgets to managing product schedules for multiple software releases. I now hope to lend this experience to empower MOCEAN’s remarkable teams.  

Thank you for considering my application - I very much look forward to discussing the role further.

Sincerely,
[Your name]
dont say mocean so many time mx two
